name: macos_builtin_en_v1
description: Fixed English clone eval set generated from macOS built-in single-speaker TTS voices.

references.reference_text: Hello, my name is Samantha. This is a clean reference clip for voice cloning. The pacing is steady and the tone is calm.
Hello, my name is Karen. This reference clip is short, clear, and easy to understand. The speaking style is natural and even.
Hello, my name is Moira. This sample is meant for clone evaluation. The voice is clean, steady, and free from background noise.
Hello, my name is Tessa. This spoken reference is clean and controlled. It should be suitable for a same-language cloning test.

prompts.text: Welcome to mlx voice. This sample checks whether the cloned voice stays natural and clear.
Welcome to mlx voice. This sample checks whether the cloned voice stays natural and clear over two full sentences.
